name: ft_nmap
title: Network Scanner
description: Custom network scanner capable of detecting open ports and identifying services on target hosts.

title: Traceroute
description: Network diagnostic tool that traces the path of packets across an IP network hop by hop.

title: Ping Utility
description: Implementation of the ICMP echo request/reply utility for testing network connectivity.

name: ft_webserv
title: HTTP Web Server
description: Implementation of an HTTP 1.1 web server in C++ compliant with RFC 7230.

name: ft_transcendence
title: Full-Stack Web App
description: Full-stack web application development project. Completed with bonus features.

name: Inception
title: Docker Infrastructure
description: Docker containerization and system administration project.

name: cub3d
title: 3D Game Engine
description: 3D raycasting game engine inspired by Wolfenstein 3D. Completed with bonus features.

name: minishell
title: Unix Shell
description: Complete shell implementation with advanced features including pipes, redirections, and built-in commands.

name: Philosophers
title: Concurrency Problem
description: Multithreading and synchronization project implementing the dining philosophers problem.

name: push_swap
title: Sorting Algorithm
description: Data sorting algorithm optimization project using stack operations.

name: Libft
title: C Standard Library
description: Recreation of essential C standard library functions plus additional utility functions.
